title: /kernel
summary_text: Correct behavior is `fail closed`, not “partially healthy.” If Codex lanes are active but you cannot establish live `glm`/specialist evidence, `/kernel` requires you to treat the run as `BLOCKED` unless one of the two valid three-voice shapes is actually live (`normal` or `degraded-allowed` after 2 GLM failures in the same run) ([kernel.md](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/.codex/prompts/kernel.md):61, [kernel.md](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/.codex/prompts/kernel.md):63, [kernel.md](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/.codex/prompts/kernel.md):64, [kernel.md](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/.codex/prompts/kernel.md):65, [CODEX.md](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/CODEX.md):154). Claims to avoid in that state: - Do not claim “healthy multi-model orchestration” with Codex-only evidence ([kernel.md](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/.codex/prompts/kernel.md):90, [CODEX.md](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/CODEX.md):154). - Do not publish `Active models:` entries without live run evidence ([kernel.md](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/.codex/prompts/kernel.md):94, [CODEX.md](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/CODEX.md):159). - Do not count unlabeled/pending/failed/planned lanes toward the minimum ([kernel.md](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/.codex/prompts/kernel.md):93, [CODEX.md](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/CODEX.md):162). - Do not emit the “Kernel orchestration is active…” acknowledgement before lanes are truly active ([kernel.md](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/.codex/prompts/kernel.md):72).
